basic_details.job_title: AAICLAS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 62 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS) - A 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India (AAI)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 62 (tentative; subject to increase or decrease as per operational requirement)
basic_details.job_location: Tirupati, Trichy, Madurai, Bhubaneswar, Udaipur (PAN India - transferable at AAICLAS discretion)
basic_details.short_information: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS), a 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India (AAI), has released Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 dated 13.05.2026 for the engagement of Assistant (Security) on a Fixed Term Contract of 3 years on PAN India basis. A total of 62 vacancies have been announced across five airport locations — Tirupati, Trichy, Madurai, Bhubaneswar, and Udaipur.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via registered Email ID and AAICLAS website

application_fee.general_fee: ₹500/- (Rupees Five Hundred only) - Excluding bank charges & other taxes
application_fee.sc_fee: ₹100/- (Rupees One Hundred only) - Excluding bank charges & other taxes
application_fee.payment_mode: Online only - Net Banking / Credit Card / Debit Card / UPI / Wallet
application_fee.note_fee: Bank charges/commission applicable for the selected mode of payment shall be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.age_details: Fixed Term Contract (FTC) for 3 Years (extendable at sole discretion of AAICLAS Management based on performance and requirement)
age_limit.details: Upper age limit is 27 years as on 01.06.2026. Age relaxations are applicable as per Government rules. The date of birth as recorded in Matriculation/Secondary Examination certificate will only be accepted.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 01.06.2026. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. | Assistant (Security) | Criteria Details Essential Educational Qualification 12th (Senior Secondary) from any recognised Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General category and 55% marks for SC/ST candidates. Percentage must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) in the online application — not in CGPA or any other format. Language Proficiency Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Job Profile Assistance in operational works at Airport, assistance to passenger baggage handling, loading and unloading of baggage, operation of X-ray machine, conveyor belt handling, and other multi-tasking operational work activities as assigned from time to time. The work involves lifting of baggage; candidates not willing to perform such work need not apply.

vacancy_details.Details: 12th (Senior Secondary) from any recognised Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General category and 55% marks for SC/ST candidates. Percentage must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) in the online application — not in CGPA or any other format.
Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language.

Assistance in operational works at Airport, assistance to passenger baggage handling, loading and unloading of baggage, operation of X-ray machine, conveyor belt handling, and other multi-tasking operational work activities as assigned from time to time. The work involves lifting of baggage; candidates not willing to perform such work need not apply.

additional_breakdown.details: 12th (Senior Secondary) from any recognised Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General category and 55% marks for SC/ST candidates. Percentage must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) in the online application — not in CGPA or any other format.
Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language.

Assistance in operational works at Airport, assistance to passenger baggage handling, loading and unloading of baggage, operation of X-ray machine, conveyor belt handling, and other multi-tasking operational work activities as assigned from time to time. The work involves lifting of baggage; candidates not willing to perform such work need not apply.

salary_details.details: Additional benefits include: | TA/DA/Lodging & Boarding (if deputed on tour) equivalent to actual fare by Ordinary Public Bus or Train fare of Sleeper Class. Leave: Privilege Leave - 18 days per year + 12 Half Pay Leave + 9 Casual Leave + 2 Restricted Holidays. Medical Insurance reimbursement of maximum ₹10,000/- per annum for self and dependent family members on production of certified tax invoice/receipt. Gratuity as per Gratuity Act, if/as applicable.

selection_process: Online applications will be screened based on eligibility criteria. Candidates with higher percentage of marks at Graduation level will be called first for the online interaction in a phased manner
subject to availability of vacancies at the particular station/location.
Eligible candidates will be called for an online interaction. The date

and venue/mode will be intimated through registered Email ID and by uploading a circular on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero. Selection will be done according to the merit list prepared on the basis of marks secured in the interview. Merely appearing in the interview does not reserve any right for selection.
Note: No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by AAICLAS for appearing in the selection process.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the AAICLAS official website www.aaiclas.aero. No application through post, Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post, or Couriers will be accepted. Only a single application will be accepted from individual candidates and candidates can apply for a single location only.
Steps to Apply Online:
Visit www.aaiclas.aero → Click on "Career" column → Click on "Apply Now" against Advertisement No. 02 of 2026.
Fill in all details correctly. Percentage of marks of 12th must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) — not in CGPA or any other format.
Upload required documents and pay the application fee online.
Ensure the Email ID entered in the application form remains active until the engagement process is completed. No change in Email ID will be allowed once entered.
Submit the application before 02.07.2026.
Documents Required to be Attached with the Online Application Form:
Senior Secondary (12th) Certificate and Mark Sheet
Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable)
Aadhaar Card Copy
Recent passport-size coloured photograph (maximum 20 KB size)
Application Fee (paid online)
Scanned Signature (maximum 20 KB size)
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Joining (if selected):
All original certificates/mark sheets/experience certificates/professional qualification certificates/training certificates
Aadhaar Card and PAN Card (originals)
Police Clearance Certificate (PCC)
Category Certificate (if applicable)
NOC from present employer (mandatory for candidates working in Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body)
One set of self-attested copy of each document
Apply Online at: www.aaiclas.aero → Career → Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 → Apply Now
For queries: Email - [email protected] (mention Advertisement No. and name of position applied for in subject line). Helpdesk Number: 011-24667781.
important_instructions: Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates must necessarily produce relevant documents pertaining to nationality, age, and educational qualifications in original at the time of joining. All eligibility criteria - age and qualification - are reckoned as on 01.06.2026. Only a single application will be accepted from individual candidates. Candidates can apply for a single location only. The place of posting can be changed to any other location within India at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, which shall be binding. In case of closure of any AAICLAS station, the individual has to complete his/her contract at another station as per the company's requirement. The FTC is initially for 3 years; the first year will be treated as probation. Extension or fresh contract will be at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, subject to satisfactory performance. The contract can be terminated earlier at the discretion of Management during its validity in case of unsatisfactory performance or due to security concerns at the duty point. Notice period for resignation is a minimum of 3 months. Candidates resigning with immediate effect will not be issued an experience letter/verification and will have to deposit 3 months' salary in lieu of the notice period not served. All communications regarding this recruitment will be made only through the registered Email ID of candidates and not by post. Candidates must regularly check their registered email. Any wrong/false information furnished by the candidate at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature without assigning any reason. If detected after engagement, the engagement will be treated as cancelled and necessary recovery will be made. Candidates working in any Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body must produce a NOC from their present employer. Any canvassing by or on behalf of the candidate or bringing political or other outside influence with regard to selection shall be considered as Disqualification. AAICLAS will not bear any liability on account of service bond/salary/leave salary/pension contribution of previous employment of any candidate working in Central/State Government/Autonomous Body/PSU. Any modifications/amendments related to this recruitment will be published on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero only. AAICLAS reserves the right to restrict/enlarge/cancel the engagement in this selection process in part or full without issuing any further notice or assigning any reason whatsoever. The decision of AAICLAS Management regarding eligibility, acceptance or rejection of applications, and mode of selection shall be final and binding on all candidates. No representation or correspondence will be entertained in this regard.

content_sections.heading: AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 62 vacancies (tentative) have been announced across 5 airport locations. The number of vacancies is subject to change at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management. Candidates can apply for a single location only. *The place of posting can be changed to any other location within India due to operational or administrative requirements at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, which shall be binding on the selected candidates.

content_sections.heading: AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Post-wise Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfil all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 01.06.2026. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Assistant (Security)

rows.details: 12th (Senior Secondary) from any recognised Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General category and 55% marks for SC/ST candidates. Percentage must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) in the online application — not in CGPA or any other format.
Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language.

Assistance in operational works at Airport, assistance to passenger baggage handling, loading and unloading of baggage, operation of X-ray machine, conveyor belt handling, and other multi-tasking operational work activities as assigned from time to time. The work involves lifting of baggage; candidates not willing to perform such work need not apply.

content_sections.heading: AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Stage 1 - Application Screening Online applications will be screened based on eligibility criteria. Candidates with higher percentage of marks at Graduation level will be called first for the online interaction in a phased manner, subject to availability of vacancies at the particular station/location. Stage 2 - Online Interaction (Interview) Eligible candidates will be called for an online interaction. The date, time, and venue/mode will be intimated through registered Email ID and by uploading a circular on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero. Selection will be done according to the merit list prepared on the basis of marks secured in the interview. Merely appearing in the interview does not reserve any right for selection. Note: No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by AAICLAS for appearing in the selection process.

content_sections.heading: AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Emoluments / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Additional benefits include: TA/DA/Lodging & Boarding (if deputed on tour) equivalent to actual fare by Ordinary Public Bus or Train fare of Sleeper Class. Leave: Privilege Leave - 18 days per year + 12 Half Pay Leave + 9 Casual Leave + 2 Restricted Holidays. Medical Insurance reimbursement of maximum ₹10,000/- per annum for self and dependent family members on production of certified tax invoice/receipt. Gratuity as per Gratuity Act, if/as applicable.

No application through post, Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post, or Couriers will be accepted. Only a single application will be accepted from individual candidates and candidates can apply for a single location only. Steps to Apply Online: Documents Required to be Attached with the Online Application Form: Senior Secondary (12th) Certificate and Mark Sheet Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable) Aadhaar Card Copy Recent passport-size coloured photograph (maximum 20 KB size) Application Fee (paid online) Scanned Signature (maximum 20 KB size) Documents to be Produced at the Time of Joining (if selected): All original certificates/mark sheets/experience certificates/professional qualification certificates/training certificates Aadhaar Card and PAN Card (originals) Police Clearance Certificate (PCC) Category Certificate (if applicable) NOC from present employer (mandatory for candidates working in Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body) One set of self-attested copy of each document

content_sections.heading: AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates must necessarily produce relevant documents pertaining to nationality, age, and educational qualifications in original at the time of joining. All eligibility criteria - age and qualification - are reckoned as on 01.06.2026. Only a single application will be accepted from individual candidates. Candidates can apply for a single location only. The place of posting can be changed to any other location within India at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, which shall be binding. In case of closure of any AAICLAS station, the individual has to complete his/her contract at another station as per the company's requirement. The FTC is initially for 3 years; the first year will be treated as probation. Extension or fresh contract will be at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, subject to satisfactory performance. The contract can be terminated earlier at the discretion of Management during its validity in case of unsatisfactory performance or due to security concerns at the duty point. Notice period for resignation is a minimum of 3 months. Candidates resigning with immediate effect will not be issued an experience letter/verification and will have to deposit 3 months' salary in lieu of the notice period not served. All communications regarding this recruitment will be made only through the registered Email ID of candidates and not by post. Candidates must regularly check their registered email. Any wrong/false information furnished by the candidate at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature without assigning any reason. If detected after engagement, the engagement will be treated as cancelled and necessary recovery will be made. Candidates working in any Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body must produce a NOC from their present employer. Any canvassing by or on behalf of the candidate or bringing political or other outside influence with regard to selection shall be considered as Disqualification. AAICLAS will not bear any liability on account of service bond/salary/leave salary/pension contribution of previous employment of any candidate working in Central/State Government/Autonomous Body/PSU. Any modifications/amendments related to this recruitment will be published on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero only. AAICLAS reserves the right to restrict/enlarge/cancel the engagement in this selection process in part or full without issuing any further notice or assigning any reason whatsoever. The decision of AAICLAS Management regarding eligibility, acceptance or rejection of applications, and mode of selection shall be final and binding on all candidates. No representation or correspondence will be entertained in this regard.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AAICLAS Assistant (Security) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the AAICLAS Assistant (Security) recruitment is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant (Security) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 62 vacancies announced for the Assistant (Security) positions across various locations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th (Sr. Secondary) from a recognized Board/University/Institution with a minimum of 60% marks for General and 55% for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Assistant (Security) posts is 27 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is ₹ 500/-. SC/ST and Women candidates need to pay ₹ 100/-.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant (Security) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on 12th marks, followed by an interaction/interview, and finally, a merit list based on interview marks and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant (Security) position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Assistant (Security) post ranges from ₹ 21,500/- in the first year to ₹ 22,500/- in the third year.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job or a contract-based position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Assistant (Security) posts is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AAICLAS?
faq.answer: The official website of AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS) is www.aaiclas.aero.
